NumberOfSportsbooks.description: The number of sportsbooks odds that went into creating this consensus outcome

BettingOutcomeID.description: The unique ID associated with the betting outcome

BettingMarketID.description: The unique ID associated with the betting market

BettingOutcomeTypeID.description: The unique ID associated with this BettingOutcomeType

BettingOutcomeType.description: The name of BettingOutcomeType (e.g. Home; Away; Under; Over)

PayoutAmerican.description: The payout of the bet, shown in American odds format

PayoutDecimal.description: The payout of the bet, shown in decimal odds format

Value.description: The number associated with the outcome of a market (e.g. the run line, game total, etc.)

Participant.description: The name of the participant (typically team or player) associated with the outcome. NOTE: This is provided by the sportsbook. In the case of Player odds, we highly recommend using PlayerID as names of players can be inconsistent between sportsbooks.

IsAvailable.description: Indicates whether a BettingOutcome is available for betting or not (true/false)

IsAlternate.description: Indicates whether this is an alternate value or the core value (true/false)

Created.description: The date and time when this betting outcome was created in US Eastern Time.

Updated.description: The date and time of the last update made to this betting outcome (in US Eastern Time)

Unlisted.description: The timestamp of when these odds were first made unavailable to be bet on any further (In US Eastern Time)

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO tied this outcome (if applicable)

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO tied to this outcome (if applicable) Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team tied to this outcome. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues (where applicable)

IsInPlay.description: Was this outcome created after the start time of the game (only applies when the betting event is of type game; true/false)

SportsbookMarketID.description: The market ID on the given sportsbook for deeplinking (when available)

SportsbookOutcomeID.description: The outcome ID on the given sportsbook for deeplinking (when available)
